title: Ubiquiti UniFi Switch US-XG-6POE
description: 10-Gigabit PoE switch Ubiquiti UniFi Switch XG 6POE with desktop design with maximum output PoE power 170W . Switch has 4x 10-Gigabit LAN ports and 2x 1/10G SFP+ optical ports with overall throughput 120 Gbps The biggest advantage of the switch is the output PoE on every 10Gbps metallic port that supports the 802.3af/at standards, including the latest 802.3bt with a maximum output 60W/port . Automatic detection ensures full functionality of 802.3af/at/bt devices without prior configuration The main difference between UniFi switches and Edge Switches is web management - Edge Switche's WebGUI management is substituted by UniFi Controller in UniFi Switches Device Power adapter 54V/3.88A Power cord Screws, dowels
